creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-05-23 14:08:35 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security             Makefile 
  Added files:
    security/prelude-pflogger Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
    security/prelude-pflogger/files prelude-pflogger.in 
  Log:
  Prelude is a new innovative hybrid Intrusion Detection system designed
  to be very modular, distributed, rock solid and fast.
  
  Prelude-PFlogger Listens at OpenBSD PF redirect logged packet, and
  send alerts to the Prelude Manager.
  
  WWW: http://www.prelude-ids.org/
  
  PR:             ports/134746
  Submitted by:   Anders Troback <freebsd at troback.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1037    +1 -0      ports/security/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/security/prelude-pflogger/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/security/prelude-pflogger/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/security/prelude-pflogger/files/prelude-pflogger.in (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/security/prelude-pflogger/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/security/prelude-pflogger/pkg-plist (new)
